channel.title: AI Stack Guide
channel.description: Straight-talking reviews and comparisons of AI tools for freelancers and small teams.

item.title: Best AI Writing Assistants for Freelancers in 2026 (Jasper vs Copy.ai vs Grammarly)
item.description: A practical comparison of Jasper, Copy.ai, and Grammarly for freelance writers and marketers who need to produce more without sacrificing quality.

item.title: Best AI Project Management Tools for Small Teams (ClickUp vs Notion vs Asana)
item.description: How ClickUp, Notion, and Asana's AI features compare for small teams trying to stay organized without a dedicated ops person.

item.title: Claude vs ChatGPT vs Gemini: Which AI Assistant Should You Use in 2026
item.description: A grounded comparison of Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini for freelancers and small business owners deciding where to put their subscription budget.

item.title: Best AI SEO Tools to Grow Organic Traffic (Surfer SEO vs Semrush vs Ahrefs)
item.description: How Surfer SEO, Semrush, and Ahrefs differ for freelancers and small businesses trying to grow search traffic without an in-house SEO hire.

item.title: Best AI Video & Presentation Tools (Synthesia vs Descript vs Pictory)
item.description: Comparing Synthesia, Descript, and Pictory for freelancers and small businesses producing video content without a production team.

item.title: 7 AI Tools That Save Freelance Writers 10+ Hours a Week
item.description: A roundup of AI tools that address the specific time-sinks freelance writers deal with, from research to editing to client admin.

item.title: Best All-in-One AI Workspaces for Solopreneurs (Notion AI vs ClickUp AI)
item.description: Comparing Notion AI and ClickUp AI for solopreneurs who want one workspace for notes, tasks, and content instead of juggling five apps.

item.title: How to Start a Side Hustle With AI Tools in 2026
item.description: A realistic starting guide to using AI tools to run a side hustle, with links to deeper comparisons for each category of tool.
